name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2004 Category A6 - Injection Flaws
description: This is a category grouping weaknesses related to the A6 category in the OWASP Top Ten 2004, covering injection flaws including command injection, OS command injection, SQL injection, XML injection, eval injection, and improper output neutralization for logs. Categories are informal organizational groupings and are prohibited for vulnerability mapping since 2019.
